risks.risk: PageSpeed may fail or time out in Cloudflare Worker runtime.
risks.mitigation: Mark Performance unavailable and do not fabricate a score.

risks.risk: Worker waitUntil is not a full dedicated background execution architecture.
risks.mitigation: Add durable queue/background worker model in Phase 2 or production hardening.

risks.risk: Turbopack tracing warning exists because local development still has filesystem-backed scan store code.
risks.mitigation: Cloudflare environments use D1; keep warning documented and remove or isolate filesystem store later.

risks.risk: Mistaken personal GitHub repository still exists.
risks.mitigation: Delete only with explicit founder approval.

risks.risk: Demand satisfaction consumes a copied active demand dataset artifact and can become stale if demand-data-generation changes are not synced.
risks.mitigation: Keep demand generation in the separate demand-data-generation repository; automate artifact publishing or syncing before scaling recurring validation.
